I can see that the comment-likes endpoint is registered at lines 220-222:\n\n```javascript\nget commentLikes() {\n    return apiFramework.pipeline(require('./comment-likes'), localUtils);\n}\n```\n\nSo the endpoint is properly registered. Now let me think about what could be wrong...\n\nActually, I just realized something very important. Looking at the endpoint registration, it uses:\n```javascript\nreturn apiFramework.pipeline(require('./comment-likes'), localUtils);\n```\n\nThis wraps the endpoint with the API framework pipeline and localUtils.
